title: check_auth_status has no doc comment
description: JmapChatClient::check_auth_status (client.rs) has no doc comment. It covers only 401 and 403, not 407 (proxy auth) or other 4xx codes. A contributor adding a new HTTP method would not know why exactly these two codes are singled out, what ClientError::AuthFailed signals to callers (do-not-retry semantics), or which spec section grounds the decision (RFC 8620 §3.6.1). Add a brief doc comment covering these three points.
